overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character in white robes exploring a lush historical Persian-style garden courtyard with stone architecture, fountains, and abundant flowers. The character walks continuously through various sections including staircases, vine-covered pergolas, open courtyards with palm trees, and ornate stone archways.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase along decorated garden wall

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase
approaching the decorative wooden gate at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone stairs alongside the arched wall, heading toward the building entrance

notable_agents.action: seated on stone bench wearing red robes

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with patterned pavement ascending along the wall
tall stone wall with repeating arched niches and decorative brickwork
lush beds of red flowers lining the right side of the staircase
wooden support posts with rope bindings at the garden entrance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by a decorated stone wall with arched niches and vibrant red flower beds. A seated figure in red robes rests on a bench to the left as the character climbs toward a gated entrance.

events.description: entering the shaded pergola covered in dense green vines
exiting the pergola into the bright open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded pergola with dappled sunlight filtering through the vines overhead

entered.detail: wooden beam structure overhead completely covered in dense green climbing vines
narrow stone water channel running along the right side of the path
stack of woven wicker baskets and goods displayed beside the path

segments.scene_description: Moving through a shaded wooden pergola densely covered in vines, dappled sunlight patterns the stone path below. Woven baskets and a narrow water channel line the right side as the character progresses through the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with central fountain and palm trees

events.description: emerging from pergola into the sunlit open courtyard
turning right to explore the courtyard perimeter near the palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking around the open courtyard examining the central fountain and surrounding palm trees

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain with water flowing in the center of the courtyard
cluster of tall palm trees with textured trunks scattered throughout the courtyard
tall stone tower with arched openings and decorative crenellations
expansive open area with geometric stone tile patterns and scattered flower petals
wooden benches with woven seats placed along the garden edges

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a bright open courtyard, the character explores a spacious area centered around a bubbling fountain, surrounded by tall palm trees and a distinctive stone tower visible in the background. The space is paved with intricate stone patterns and scattered with flower petals.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path with water pool and flower beds

events.description: encountering two NPCs standing on the stairs ahead
approaching the rectangular reflecting pool surrounded by flowers

agents.ego_description: walking along garden paths past the water pool and ascending stairs near the building entrance

notable_agents.action: standing on stairs wearing long green dress with head covering
standing near building entrance in dark robes with arms crossed

entered.detail: rectangular stone-lined pool with still water reflecting the sky
large bushes with vibrant purple flowers flanking the stone stairs
covered walkway with stone arches leading to the next garden section

segments.scene_description: Navigating through lush garden paths, the character ascends a short flight of stairs past two standing NPCs—one in a green dress and another in dark robes—then proceeds alongside a rectangular reflecting pool. The area features purple flowering bushes, wooden benches, and a covered walkway with stone arches.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone pergola with decorative arches

events.description: entering the large stone pergola with geometric shadow patterns
slowing pace to observe the architectural details of the pergola

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand stone pergola examining the architectural arches and shadow patterns

entered.detail: grand stone structure with large decorative arches creating geometric shadows on the ground
large ornate clay pots and urns flanking the pergola entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand stone pergola with large decorative arches casting geometric shadows across the pavement. Large decorative pots flank the entrance as the character walks through this architectural feature, with glimpses of the garden visible through the archways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a structured stone ascent through shaded walkways and into a sprawling, sun-drenched garden courtyard. It begins as the character climbs a wide stone staircase flanked by red flower beds and arched niches, passing a seated figure in red robes toward a gated entrance. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into the cool shade of a vine-covered wooden pergola where dappled sunlight falls across a stone path lined with woven baskets and a narrow water channel. The environment then opens into a bright, expansive courtyard centered around a bubbling fountain and tall palm trees, before transitioning through lush paths with purple flowering bushes and reflecting pools. Finally, the camera follows the character into a grand stone pergola, where large decorative arches cast geometric shadows across the pavement as the garden remains visible through the ornate stonework.
